finding: During TASK-RFT-0047, the task scope contained packages/cli/src/commands/next/route-resolution/**/*.ts, but taskflow pre-close excluded the newly created child modules from the governed delivery bundle until each file was explicitly scope-added.
expectedBehavior: Taskflow commit-bundle projection should expand supported glob scope paths for new in-scope files, or emit an early deterministic warning that explicit child paths are required before implementation/commit.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-RFT-0047 pre-close reported the new route-resolution child modules as outside task scope despite the route-resolution/**/*.ts scope entry; explicit tasks scope add for seven child modules resolved the projection gap.
followUp: Open a governance task to make taskflow bundle assembly and pre-close scope projection consistently expand **/*.ts scope paths, with a regression covering newly created child files.
